Departments

L.D. College of Engineering offers diverse academic departments dedicated to excellence in technical education, research, and societal impact.

Electrical Engineering

Computer Engineering

Information Technology

Mechanical Engineering

Applied Mechanics

Chemical Engineering

Plastic Technology

Environment Engineering

Science and Humanities
